basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Goalpara – Coaches and Teachers – 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Goalpara Recruitment 2026 notification released for 13 Coaches and Teachers posts. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as NIS Coach, AIFF D License, coaching certificates, B Music, and Dance qualifications can attend the walk-in interview on 18 and 19 June 2026 at Sainik School Goalpara.

qualification.education_qualification: NIS Coach, AIFF D License, Diploma
